description: Avatar Audio Configuration is a component that allows for overriding Avatar Audio Output Manager voice configs in worlds using user injection.

fields.Normal: The settings to override ``NormalConfig`` on an Avatar Audio Output Manager with.
fields.Shout: The settings to override ``ShoutConfig`` on an Avatar Audio Output Manager with.
fields.Broadcast: The settings to override ``BroadcastConfig`` on an Avatar Audio Output Manager with.

usage: attach this component as part of the hierarchy of a slot that is put into ``AutoInject`` on a Common Avatar Builder Component on the world root. When the component is injected, it will auto fill itself into the ``_audioConfiguration`` of the user's Avatar Audio Output Manager and allow for overriding the user's audio config.

notes.title: Related Components
notes.text:
* For how world injected modules work (which said injected slot can contain this component) see Common Avatar Builder Component
* For the component this overrides for user voices, see Avatar Audio Output Manager.
